background: We have established for the smoking and lung cancer illustrative example that n=11, b=0.02284, s_{Y|X}=8.349, and s_X=378.451. Let us calculate a 95% confidence interval for the slope parameter β.

task.query: Calculate the standard error of the slope parameter β using the given values.
Identify the t-value for a 95% confidence level with degrees of freedom n-2.
Compute the 95% confidence interval for the slope parameter β.
